title: Ano Poli Student Studio: Perfect 1-Bed Base

about.summary: Ano Poli student studio located in the traditional Kleious building near City Centre Thessaloniki. This perfect studio is ideal for students, Erasmus students, and digital nomads looking for comfortable student accommodation.

sections.title: Ano Poli Student Studio Guide
sections.content: This studio offers an excellent base for your studies. It features a 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed configuration, making it a perfect private setup. You will find everything needed for daily life right here.
highlights: Fully equipped: The studio has the essentials for student accommodation.
Erasmus housing: Ideal for Erasmus students wanting to experience the historic area.
Flexible stay: Great setup for digital nomads requiring a dedicated workspace.

sections.title: Location near City Centre Thessaloniki
sections.content: The building is located at the beginning of Ano Poli, just a short walk to City Centre Thessaloniki. Daily errands are easy with shops nearby. You can easily access various city attractions without hassle.
highlights: Everything nearby: Supermarkets and cafes are around 50 meters away.
University access: Aristotle University and City College are within easy walking distance.
Walkable area: The commercial center is a 5-10 minute walk, reducing the need for daily bus use.

sections.title: Bills, Services & Links
sections.content: Maintenance, water, and Wi-Fi are included in the rent. Electricity is paid separately. For more information about exploring the city, check out this Thessaloniki travel guide. We would love to host you in this comfortable studio. Check out our other Kleious listings if you are looking for different options.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Playing musical instruments: not allowed. Not suitable for couples. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Age and gender: no preference.

seo.seo_title: Ano Poli Student Studio: Perfect 1-Bed Base
seo.seo_description: Ano Poli student studio ideal for Erasmus students. This perfect 1-bed base is near Aristotle University, ideal for digital nomads.
